source.definition: to combine or include parts into a whole

explanation.sourceText: The English verb "integrate" comes from the Latin "integrare," meaning "to make whole" or "to renew."
explanation.targetText: Cuvântul englezesc „integrate“ provine din latinul „integrare“, care înseamnă „a face întreg“ sau „a reînnoi“.

source.additional: Regular verb. Commonly used in mathematical, computer science, and social contexts.

target.definition: a include sau a face parte dintr-un întreg

explanation.sourceText: The Romanian verb "a integra" comes from the Latin "integrare," meaning "to make whole" or "to insert." It is used in mathematics, social sciences, and computer science.
explanation.targetText: Verbul românesc „a integra“ provine din latinul „integrare“, care înseamnă „a face întreg“ sau „a introduce“.

target.additional: Regular first conjugation verb (-a). Important in mathematics, computer science, and social sciences.

explanation.sourceText: The act of inserting elements into a larger system or whole.
explanation.targetText: Introducerea elementelor într-un sistem sau întreg mai mare.

examples.sourceText: I integrate the new data into the system.
examples.targetText: Eu integrez noile date în sistem.

explanation.sourceText: Including people or groups into a community or project.
explanation.targetText: Includerea persoanelor sau grupurilor într-o comunitate sau proiect.

examples.sourceText: Do you integrate the students into the project?
I integrate the new data into the system.
examples.targetText: Eu integrez noile date în sistem.

examples.sourceText: Do you integrate the students into the project?
The teacher integrates new methods.
We integrate different approaches.
Do you integrate the results into the report?
They integrate the different systems.
I have integrated the modules.
They have integrated the changes.
He integrated the students into the class.
I had already integrated the data.
I will integrate the software.
He will integrate the columns.
I would integrate them if I had the time.
examples.targetText: Aș integra dacă aș avea timp.

examples.sourceText: It is important that you integrate the strategy.
Integrate the data!
Integrate the information into the project!
The integrated systems work efficiently.
The modules are now integrated.
Integrating, she found solutions to the problems.
examples.targetText: Integrând, a găsit soluții pentru probleme.

learningTips.text: The English word "integrate" and Romanian "a integra" are cognates—this helps you quickly connect their meanings!
Think of math: integration means combining parts into a whole—just like "a integra."
Remember the present tense ending "-ez" in "integrez" as a clue for the first person singular.
Imagine fitting puzzle pieces together—that's how "a integra" works.
